known_gaps: Writer correctness currently blocks before KiCad DRC because generated LED PCB pads and copper can miss net codes when no library pad hints are available.
Routing is intentionally skipped for the first KiCad-backed smoke fixture until pad-net correctness is promoted to a passing optional example.
notes: Smallest optional design-create fixture for local real kicad-cli smoke runs; currently tracks the pad-net writer correctness blocker.
